meta.title: Pricing Simulator - Go Cosmic
meta.description: Estimate the cost of your web or mobile project with our interactive pricing simulator. Get a personalised quote for your website or mobile application.

pricing.title: Pricing Simulator
pricing.subtitle: Answer a few questions to get an estimate for your project

step1.question: What would you like to create?

step2.question: What type of website do you need?

step3.question: How often would you like to update the content?

options.self_managed: I want to manage it myself, whenever I want

mobile.title: Mobile Application
mobile.disclaimer: * Indicative price, to be negotiated according to your needs and timeline.
mobile.description: Mobile application development is billed at a daily rate. The final cost depends on the complexity, the number of features, and the targeted platforms (iOS, Android).

complex_website.title: Custom Website
complex_website.disclaimer: * Indicative price based on needs and timeline. No fixed price for a fully customisable website.
complex_website.description: This type of project (with client accounts or e-commerce) is complex and fully customisable. The final cost depends on your specific requirements.
complex_website.no_fixed_price: No fixed price for a fully customisable website — each project is unique.

items.content_update: Up to 1 content update per month
Up to 1 content update per week

self_managed.title: Self-Managed CMS
self_managed.disclaimer: * Base daily rate — final price to be discussed based on your CMS requirements.
self_managed.description: A custom CMS will be developed so you can manage your content independently, whenever you want. The development cost is based on the daily rate and will be agreed according to your needs.

contact.title: Let's discuss your project
contact.description: Contact us to get a personalised quote and discuss your project in detail.
contact.subject: Pricing inquiry — Project quote
contact.aria_label: Send an email to prospect@gocosmic.dev for a project quote
